title: MFMS JMI Nursery Teacher Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 10 Posts
short_info: Mushir Fatma Nursery School (MFMS JMI) Nursery Teacher Notification 2026 has been released on 27-05-2026 on the official website of Jamia Millia Islamia (JMI). A total of 10 vacancies have been announced through the MFMS JMI Nursery Teacher Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma / certificate in Nursery Education / Training from a recognized institute OR a B.Ed (Nursery)
qualification.details: Senior secondary school certificate (or its equivalent) with at least 50% marks in aggregate from a recognized Board/university. Diploma/certificate in Nursery Education/Training from a recognized institute OR a B.Ed (Nursery). Must have the ability to read and write Urdu.

salary_details.pay_scale: Paid on a per period basis
salary_details.details: Paid on a per period basis

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MFMS JMI Nursery Teacher Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 09-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MFMS JMI Nursery Teacher (Guest) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the MFMS JMI Nursery Teacher (Guest) recruitment is 09-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Nursery Teacher (Guest) posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies available for the Nursery Teacher (Guest) posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required educational qualification for the Nursery Teacher (Guest) post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Senior secondary school certificate with at least 50% marks and a Diploma/certificate in Nursery Education/Training or a B.Ed (Nursery). Proficiency in Urdu is also required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST).

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Nursery Teacher (Guest) position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Nursery Teacher (Guest) position is paid on a per period basis.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the MFMS JMI Nursery Teacher (Guest) recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the Mushir Fatma Nursery School located?
faq.answer: Mushir Fatma Nursery School is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110025.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the links provided in the Important Links section of this article.
